name: NI 43-101 Technical Report (FS) for the Blanco Project in Chile dated 2019.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report (FS) for the Blanco Project in Chile dated 2019.pdf
document.description: This report provides a definitive feasibility study, mineral resource, and reserve estimates for the Blanco Project, including the technical and economic viability of producing 20,000 TPY of lithium carbonate.
